title: AbilityFile
description: Root structure for per-card ability JSON files.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion

faces.description: Per-face ability definitions for multi-face cards

AbilityDefinition.description: Parsed ability definition with typed effect. Zero remaining_params.

ContinuousModification.description:
What modification a continuous effect applies to an object.
Each variant knows its own layer implicitly.

DamageAmount.description: How to specify a damage amount -- either a fixed integer or a variable reference.

Effect.description:
The typed effect enum. Each variant corresponds to an effect handler.
Zero HashMap<String, String> fields.

oneOf.description: Generic continuous effect application at resolution.

Semantic marker for effects the engine has not yet implemented a handler for.
Carries zero HashMap -- architecturally distinct from the removed Effect::Other.

FaceAbilities.description: Per-face ability set for multi-face cards.

FilterProp.description: Individual filter properties that can be combined in a Typed filter.

Keyword.description:
All MTG keywords as typed enum variants.
Simple (unit) variants for keywords with no parameters.
Parameterized variants carry associated data (ManaCost for costs, amounts, etc.).
Unknown captures any unrecognized keyword string for forward compatibility.

Custom Deserialize: accepts both the typed externally-tagged format (new)
and plain "Name:Param" strings (legacy card-data.json).

ProtectionTarget.description: What a Protection keyword protects from.

ReplacementDefinition.description: Replacement effect definition with typed fields. Zero params HashMap.

ReplacementEvent.description:
All replacement event types from Forge's replacement effect registry.
Matched case-sensitively against Forge event strings.

oneOf.description: Fallback for unrecognized replacement event strings.

StaticDefinition.description: Static ability definition with typed fields. Zero params HashMap.

StaticMode.description:
All static ability modes from Forge's static ability registry.
Matched case-sensitively against Forge mode strings.

oneOf.description: Fallback for unrecognized static mode strings.

TargetFilter.description: Typed target filter replacing all Forge filter strings and TargetSpec.

TriggerDefinition.description: Trigger definition with typed fields. Zero params HashMap.

TriggerMode.description:
All trigger modes from Forge's TriggerType enum.
Matched case-sensitively against Forge trigger mode strings.

oneOf.description: Fallback for unrecognized trigger mode strings.

TypeFilter.description: Type filter for card type matching in filters.
